description: prepare-save-request.ts line 74 uses an unsafe type assertion 'as ValidatedSaveRequest' to construct the return value. If the ValidatedSaveRequest type has branded/opaque fields, readonly constraints, or additional required fields that are not present in the object literal, this assertion silently bypasses TypeScript's structural type checker. The constructed object should satisfy the type naturally without needing a cast, or a factory/constructor function should be used.
